statement: A 20 kg crate slides down a rough incline (angle 25°, kinetic friction coefficient μk = 0.3). Find the acceleration of the crate down the incline. Use g = 9.81 m/s².
common_student_errors: Using μk with the full weight instead of the normal force component: friction = μk·N, not μk·mg
Adding friction force in the same direction as motion instead of opposing it
Using static friction coefficient for a sliding (kinetic) problem
